throttle._note: 0V=max/dangerous, 3.1V=min/landed -> INVERTED: minimum_code (safe/landed) is the larger raw code, maximum_code is 0. centre_code is not read by calibration.throttle_code() (unipolar 0..1 mapping, no centre point) — it is set to the min/max midpoint only because Calibration.is_complete() requires no null values anywhere in the file.

pitch._note: Hardware-measured via i2ctransfer + multimeter on the real loaded circuit (bus 1, address 0x61). NOT calculated — supersedes an earlier placeholder that incorrectly assumed a 3.3V reference voltage.

roll._note: Hardware-limited endpoints, not calculated — the PCF8591's digital range (0-255) is fixed, but the achievable voltage swing under this loaded circuit is narrower than its theoretical 0-3.3V reference (~0.75V-2.6V measured). These three codes ARE the calibration, measured directly on the loaded circuit; no further roll calibration pass is needed.
